name: HRA Exemption Calculator India

before.shortDescription: Calculate monthly and annual HRA exemption using salary, HRA received, rent paid, and metro or non-metro rules.
before.metaDescription: Calculate HRA exemption in India using salary, HRA received, rent paid, and metro or non-metro city rules.

after.shortDescription: Calculate your monthly and annual HRA exemption in India. Input salary, HRA, rent, and city type to estimate your tax-saving potential accurately with RupeeKit.
after.metaDescription: Estimate your HRA exemption in India with RupeeKit's calculator. Understand how salary, HRA, rent, and city impact your tax savings. For informational...
